steps_completed.finding: Updated Pattern A threshold to 12 months (since 3 months was too restrictive for this dataset). Successfully generated review_sample.md with 20 stratified and edge case candidates.
Contains 10 files provided by organizers, including candidates.jsonl and validate_submission.py.

Found that duplicate descriptions (35.77% of dataset) are present in the raw candidates.jsonl on disk. Audited Pattern B logic in sample_for_review.py and found it triggers false positives due to generic tech content-writing/SEO templates containing the word 'search'.
